---
title: "Confidence and Credibility Intervals for the Difference of Two Proportions"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2010-07-08"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
  - "R"
---

My article about confidence and credibility intervals published in [REVCOLES](http://www.estadistica.unal.edu.co/publicaciones/estadistica/rce/v33_1.html)… if you are performing some test about proportions, this article could be of interest for you. You can read it by [clicking here](http://www.estadistica.unal.edu.co/publicaciones/estadistica/rce/V33/v33n1a05ZhangGutierrezCepeda.pdf).
